recommendations.title: The Marquez-Castillo Siblings
recommendations.overview: A group of four siblings compete for the heritage of their father.

recommendations.title: Música
recommendations.overview: A young man, plagued by the music in his head, has to come to terms with an uncertain future while balancing love, family and Brazilian culture in Newark, New Jersey.

recommendations.title: Housebound
recommendations.overview: When Kylie Bucknell is sentenced to home detention, she's forced to come to terms with her unsociable behaviour, her blabbering mother and a hostile spirit who seems less than happy about the new living arrangement.

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity
recommendations.overview: After a young, middle-class couple moves into what seems like a typical suburban house, they become increasingly disturbed by a presence that may or may not be demonic but is certainly the most active in the middle of the night.

recommendations.title: Today's Special
recommendations.overview: Young Manhattan chef Samir rediscovers his heritage and passion for life through the enchanting art of cooking Indian food.

recommendations.title: Maurice
recommendations.overview: After his lover rejects him, Maurice attempts to come to terms with his sexuality within the restrictiveness of Edwardian society.

recommendations.title: Martyrs
recommendations.overview: A woman and her childhood friend seek out revenge on those who victimized and abused them.

recommendations.title: The Hollow Child
recommendations.overview: Samantha has lived her whole life in different foster homes. Now living in a small town, she never feels like she quite fits in, even with her own current foster family who might adopt her, or the boy who follows her around doing her classwork. So, i

recommendations.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
recommendations.overview: A young Greek woman falls in love with a non-Greek and struggles to get her family to accept him while she comes to terms with her heritage and cultural identity.
